scripts.lessons:build: npm run quartz:link && npm run lessons:export && node quartz/bootstrap-cli.mjs build -d web/lessons/content -o web/lessons/public && npm run lessons:clean
scripts.lessons:serve: npm run lessons:build && node scripts/serve_static.mjs web/lessons/public 8080
scripts.lessons:dev: npm run quartz:link && npm run lessons:export && node quartz/bootstrap-cli.mjs build --serve -d web/lessons/content -o web/lessons/public
